snippet.title: Dosije - Misterija sivog Citroena | PRVA
snippet.description:
Na samo 200 metara od svoje kuńáe u selu Mramor nadomak NiŇ°a brutalno je likvidiran vlasnik mesare Dakom, ugledni biznismen i porodińćan ńćovek. U tom trenutku meŇ°tani su ostali u Ň°oku, nikom nije bilo jasno kome je smetao ńćovek koji je imao sopstveni biznis i poŇ°teno Ňĺiveo od njega. Da tragedija bude veńáa njegovo telo pronaŇ°ao je mlańĎi sin, dozivao je oca ali bezuspeŇ°no.


Policija se istog trenutka dala u potragu za pońćiniocem. Njihova istraga bila je mukotrpna i temeljna, bilo je momenata kada su nailazili na ńáorsokak i bezizlazne situacije ali ipak ubice su bile i bliŇĺe nego Ň°to su mogli da zamisle.



Pratite nas na: http://bit.ly/PRVAsub

Posetite naŇ° sajt: http://www.prva.rs/
Lajkujte nas i na Fejsbuku: http://bit.ly/PRVAfb
MoŇĺete nas pratiti i na Instagramu: http://bit.ly/PRVAig
MoŇĺete nas pratiti i na Tviteru: http://bit.ly/PRVAtwitter

snippet.title: Oko magazin: Palma i Marinika - biti ili ne biti
snippet.description:
Da li se politińćar u Jagodini bavi podvońĎenjem Ňĺena ili se ńćak i na ovakvim temama pravi politińćki rijaliti

Dragan Markovińá Palma i Marinika Tepińá su osobe o kojima se najviŇ°e govori proteklih sedam dana u Srbiji. Sve je pońćelo od njenih optuŇĺbi za podvońĎenje i pedofiliju u Jagodini. Dragan Markovińá tvrdi da u ovom sluńćaju nema ni svedoka ni Ňĺrtve, veńá se od svega pravi politińćki rijaliti. Marinika Tepińá juńće je dala izjavu u policiji u Jagodini i rekla da ima joŇ° 7 svedoka koji bi mogli da svedońće protiv Dragana Markovińáa Palme, ali da neńáe da otkrije njihov identitet dok ne dobiju zaŇ°titu.

1959. Fidel Kastro je predvodio Komunistińćku revoluciju na Kubi a njegov mlańĎi brat Raul bio je jedan od komandanata. 62 godine kasnije, 89-godiŇ°nji Raul Kastro povlańći se sa ńćela Komunistińćke partije Kube. Kakva ńáe da bude Kuba bez prezimena Kastro i da li Kuba od levińćarske inspiracije postaje zemlja na putu tranzicije ka kapitalizmu?

Urednik emisije: Gorislav Papińá

Fidel Kastro je predvodio Komunistińćku revoluciju na Kubi a njegov mlańĎi brat Raul bio je jedan od komandanata. 62 godine kasnije, 89-godiŇ°nji Raul Kastro povlańći se sa ńćela Komunistińćke partije Kube. Kakva ńáe da bude Kuba bez prezimena Kastro i da li Kuba od levińćarske inspiracije postaje zemlja na putu tranzicije ka kapitalizmu?

Urednik emisije: Gorislav Papińá

snippet.title: Persona non grata: ŇĹarko Korańá, Milan ńÜulibrk i Vladimir Gajińá
snippet.description:
Od Arkanovih tigrova do jagodinskog age. Kako je nastao i Ň°ta je postao Dragan Markovińá Palma? O nańćinu vladanja, govora i ponaŇ°anja koje godinama gradi, od milostinje za sirotinju do bunga bunga Ňĺurki za bogatu gospodu. Da li je Palma postao fenomen srpske politike?

O ńćoveku koji se ovih dana nalazi u srcu skandala i optuŇĺbi za pedofiliju govore psiholog ŇĹarko Korańá, novinar Milan ńÜulibrk i advokat Vladimir Gajińá.

snippet.title: BEZ USTRUńĆAVANJA - Toma Fila: Ubio bih Palmu da sam ja otac devojńćice koju je podvodio!
snippet.description:
Gost emisije ‚ÄúBez ustruńćavanja‚ÄĚ bio je advokat i narodni poslanik SPS-a u SkupŇ°tini Srbije Toma Fila koji nas je opet iznenadio neobjavljenim ńćinjenicama vezanim za hapŇ°enje i izruńćenje HaŇ°kom Tribunalu nekadaŇ°njeg Predsednika Srbije Slobodana MiloŇ°evińáa. Ugledni advokat se osvrnuo i na seriju ‚ÄúPorodica‚ÄĚ koja se nedavno prikazala na RTS-u i dao svoje miŇ°ljenje da li je serija trebala biti snimljena ili ne. Govorio je o netańćnim dogańĎajima koji su prikazani u seriji, kakvi su zaista bili ńćlanovi porodice MiloŇ°evińá, koje uloge su imali akteri dogańĎaja koji su bili prisutni u vili ‚ÄúMir‚ÄĚ na Dedinju. Da li je glavni motiv izruńćenja bio novac ili neŇ°to drugo, da li je bilo nuńĎenja mita, koje sve navode i natpise iz medija smo mogli da vidimo poslednjih meseci otkriva branilac Slobodana MiloŇ°evińáa. O samom HaŇ°kom Tribunalu, sudijama, procesu, advokat je bez ustruńćavanja govorio, ali i u koga se i zbog ńćega razońćarao. Toma Fila je otvoreno govorio i zbog ńćega se prikljuńćio SPS-u, iako kako kaŇĺe nikada nije bio simpatizer politike koju je vodio Slobodan MiloŇ°evińá. Kao narodni poslanik komentarisao je i narativ koji se koristi u SkupŇ°tini Srbije, o menjanju Ustava koji predstoji, kao i o usvajanju Zakona o istopolnim zajednicama. Komentarisao je i afere silovanja koje okupiraju javnost, ali i sluńćaj ‚ÄúPalma‚ÄĚ, kao i mnoge druge aktuelnosti.

snippet.title: Lukińá: Prijava 393 Ňĺene veńái dokaz porobljene Jagodine od svega Ň°to kaŇĺe Tepińá
snippet.description:
Novinarka Biljana Lukińá ocenila je u Novom danu da je krivińćna prijava koju su u Jagodini podnele 393 Ňĺene "veńái dokaz porobljene Jagodine od svega Ň°to su rekli Marinika i svedok". Istakla je da Jagodina nije usamljeni sluńćaj. "Svaki taj Ň°erif u malom mestu u Srbiji se isto tako ponaŇ°a", naglasila je ona.

snippet.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs. Manchester City: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Manchester City picked up a decisive 2-1 win in the first leg of the UEFA semi final against Paris Saint-Germain. 

PSG came out firing in the first half and converted one of their many chances into a goal. Marquinhos scored in the 15‚Äô to give PSG the lead. PSG kept the pressure on in the first half and finished with 9 shots on goal. 

In the second half PSG was content to sit back and defend the one goal lead. Manchester City took advantage and notched two goals both from set pieces. 
De Bruyne scored in the 64' when he tried to play the ball to the far post off of a free kick and instead found the back of the bet. Then Mahrez put the English side ahead in the 71' when he found the hole in the PSG wall off of a free kick right outside the box. 

Manchester City was able to maintain that one goal lead and will head back home with a huge advantage on aggregate. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on Paramount+:
https://www.paramountplus.com/shows/uefa-champions-league/

#UCL #UEFA #ChampionsLeague #PSG #ManCity #ManchesterCity #ParisSaintGermain

PSG came out firing in the first half and converted one of their many chances into a goal. Marquinhos scored in the 15‚Äô to give PSG the lead. PSG kept the pressure on in the first half and finished with 9 shots on goal. 

In the second half PSG was content to sit back and defend the one goal lead. Manchester City took advantage and notched two goals both from set pieces. 
De Bruyne scored in the 64' when he tried to play the ball to the far post off of a free kick and instead found the back of the bet. Then Mahrez put the English side ahead in the 71' when he found the hole in the PSG wall off of a free kick right outside the box. 

Manchester City was able to maintain that one goal lead and will head back home with a huge advantage on aggregate. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on Paramount+:
https://www.paramountplus.com/shows/uefa-champions-league/

#UCL #UEFA #ChampionsLeague #PSG #ManCity #ManchesterCity #ParisSaintGermain

snippet.description:
Svi koji Ňĺele pomońái porodici Ibre Smajińáa mogu ga kontaktirati na telefon: 061 875 357 Adresa: selo Bukve b.b , 72250 Vitez, BiH
PridruŇĺite se tom kanalu da biste dobili pristup pogodnostima:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIu6gtFVDK1u93irvvVrD2A/join
Ibrahim Smajińá iz Viteza meńĎunarodni praznik rada dońćekuje na njivi s plugom u rukama i upregnutim konjem. On je joŇ° uvijek radnik bez plańáe, penzije, ikakvih primanja. Samo ono Ň°to zaradi s konjem to i ima. Pored toga ima i bolesnog punoljetnog sina koji je invalid. Na pitanje  zaŇ°to radi na meńĎunarodni praznik rada, Ibro je odgovorio: "Pa zar nije praznik rada, treba se raditi a ne odmarati. Ibro zahvaljuje dijaspori koja ga je kako kaŇĺe ostavila na Ňĺivotu. ViŇ°e pogledajte u video prińći.

hr.title: Diana i koŇ°arkaŇ° u Dianinoj kuńái | Mala sestra je sve upropastila!
hr.description:
Diana je pozvala svog deńćka iz koŇ°arke kod sebe. No, postojala je jedna nijansa, Dianina mlańĎa sestra takońĎer je bila kod kuńáe i saznala da je Diana kuńái dovela svog deńćka. MlańĎa sestra to nije ostavila tako lako, a za zaljubljeni par priredila je iznenańĎenja! Ň†to je smislila mlańĎa sestra? Kako je Diana cijelu Ň°kolu dobila kod kuńáe? Pogledajte ovo izdanje!
Pretplatite se na kanal! ūüĎ©‚ÄćūüĎ©‚ÄćūüĎ¶‚ÄćūüĎ¶

hr.title: Najbolji glumci iz Dianine Ň°kole bit ńáe poslani u Hollywood | Tko ńáe zaustaviti Dianu?
hr.description:
Producenti su u Dianinu Ň°kolu doŇ°li odabrati najbolje glumce i poslali ih u Hollywood. Svi su okupili svoje ekipe i pońćeli se pripremati za natjecanje. Ali odjednom, Diana i njezini prijatelji ne mogu pronańái uniformu, netko ju je ukrao kako Diana ne bi imala priliku pobijediti na natjecanju! Tko je ukrao uniformu? Tko ńáe pobijediti na natjecanju? Pogledajte ovu seriju!

Bao is a 2018 American computer-animated short film written and directed by Domee Shi and produced by Pixar Animation Studios. It was released with Incredibles 2 on June 15, 2018. The film is about an aging and lonely Chinese-Canadian mother, suffering from empty nest syndrome, who receives an unexpected second chance at motherhood when she makes a steamed bun (baozi) that comes to life. The film won the Oscar for the Best Animated Short Film at the 91st Academy Awards.

A Chinese-Canadian woman suffering from empty nest syndrome gets a second shot at motherhood when one of her handmade dumplings comes alive.

¬© 2018 The Walt Disney Company. | All Rights Reserved.

snippet.title: SAT: Ň†ta da radite ako nemate katalizator ili DPF?
snippet.description:
Od ovog leta pońćinje primena stroŇĺih pravila na tehnińćkim pregledima, a najveńái problem bińáe merenje kvaliteta izduvnih gasova, jer mnogi automobili upravo zbog tih merenja neńáe viŇ°e mońái da budu registrovani.

Emisija SAT detaljno ńáe govoriti o katalizatorima i DPF filterima koje bi polovnjaci stari i do 20 godina morali da imaju, a mnogi ne znaju da li ih poseduju i da li su ispravni. U emisiji otkrivaju kako da proverite da li je na vaŇ°em automobilu neki od tih filtera izvańĎen i ako jeste, Ň°ta da uradite kako biste proŇ°li tehnińćki pregled.

Ljubitelji automobila uŇĺivańáe u uporednom testu BMW-a "serije 1" protiv audija "A3", a u rubrici "Predstavljamo" testirali su novu dańćiju "logan".

Urednik i voditelj je Mladen Alvirovińá.

Repriza emisije je petkom u 11.00 na Drugom programu.


Copyright: Radio televizija Srbije
 
Zabranjeno svako kopiranje video i/ili audio snimaka i postavljanje na druge kanale!

snippet.title: FIBA EuroBasket 2022 Draw
snippet.description:
The 41st edition of the FIBA EuroBasket will take place in four countries, with Czech Republic, Georgia, Germany and Italy co-hosting Europe's flagship event in 2022.

The Group Phase of the event will be staged in Prague (CZE), Tbilisi (GEO), Cologne (GER) and Milan (ITA), with each of the cities hosting one group each.

The top four teams from each group will advance to the Final Phase in Germany's capital Berlin, where the European champions will be crowned in September 2022.

FIBA EuroBasket 2022 will take place from September 1-18, 2022.

snippet.title: Man jumps feet-first into moving car through window to stop dangerous driver in Albania
snippet.description:
A man has jumped through the window of a moving car to stop an erratic and dangerous driver in the main square of Albania's capital, Tirana. The footage showed a damaged vehicle being dangerously driven in Skanderbeg Square as people tried to stop it. Police said the 32-year-old driver had previously crashed three other cars in other parts of the city. The video was captured by dozens of cameras set up in Skanderbeg Square to report on the general election in Albania

He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

snippet.description:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/guhsajan/
Spotify: uskoro...
Deezer: uskoro...

Muzika i Tekst: GUH

Tekst/Lyrics:

Poceo od nule vidi gde sam tada bio
Igrao sam igru ko da bila je kazino
Kido
Zajedno smo jaki ko Vegito
Preuzimam scenu nece me spreciti niko  (x2)

Al put je dug znaj da cimo sam se kao nikad pre
Nisam znao nista al u glavi imao sam sve
Laptop, daska , krevet, kamera ja jurim svoje sne
To sam ja GUH SAJAN koji ne odustaje

Bio slep
Nisam znao ko pravi drugar je
Mnogo njih se pravi da to jesu, a mnogi su fejk
Svako gleda svoju korist i to gadi mi se eeej
Moram nositi se stime moram paziti na sve

Ja sam gladan uspeha i idem sada ka svom snu
Sujeta ih jede i to ne mogu da prikriju
Maska dole, Maska gore lica manjaju vam se
Polecem polecem, gore zvezde zovu me

Najgore je to sto ljude vidis samo kao broj
Neki gledaju te i pisu ti kako nisi svoj
Vremenom tek vide kolko to pogresna je vest
JEDAN JE GUH SAJAN I NE POSTOJI COPY PASTE

snippet.title: Emanet 169. B√∂l√ľm | Legacy Episode 169
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: Emanet 168. B√∂l√ľm | Legacy Episode 168
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#BizGer√ßeńüiz
#SehYam

snippet.title: Prince Philip's funeral: the key moments
snippet.description:
The funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh has taken place at St George's Chapel in Windsor.

The Queen led her family in mourning her husband of 73 years.

The service was led by the Dean of Windsor, who paid tribute to Prince Philip's "kindness, humour and humanity" - as well as his "unwavering loyalty" to Her Majesty.

Sky's Jason Farrell looks at how the funeral unfolded.

snippet.title: GoŇ°ńáe N1: Mariniku Tepińá nisu tuŇĺile Ňĺene, veńá maŇ°inerija Markovińáa Palme
snippet.description:
Tanja Ignjatovińá iz Autonomnog Ňĺenskog centra i Biljana Maletin iz ŇĹenske platforme za razvoj Srbije kaŇĺu da Mariniku Tepińá, koja je u javnost iznela tvrdnje da je predsednik Jedinstvene Srbije Dragan Markovińá Palma podvodio maloletnice i Ňĺene u Jagodini, nisu tuŇĺile Ňĺene, veńá Palmina maŇ°inerija. Povodom izjave predsednika Srbije Aleksandra Vuńćińáa da ńáe biti jezivo ako se dokaŇĺe da je to tańćno, a joŇ° jezivije ako se dokaŇĺe da nije tańćno, Biletin navodi da joj je to "najstraŇ°nija izjava" i da je umesto nje trebalo da kaŇĺe da nijednoj devojńćici i Ňĺeni ovako neŇ°to ne sme da se desi ni u jednom gradu, dok Ignjatovińá dodaje da je izjava problematińćna, jer to sluŇ°aju i institucije. "On je dao poruku ne samo grańĎanima da ne podrŇĺavaju (Ňĺrtve), veńá i institucijama da ne istraŇĺe ovo". ViŇ°e na https://bit.ly/3tPILEd.
